title: Claude Product Diary — inaugural entry, 8 updates mapped to Eric's use cases
summary: Mapped 8 Anthropic platform + Claude Code updates to Eric's active use cases. Top findings: (1) Advisor Tool = ~$1.85 savings per FinancialReportApp report, detailed 4-file implementation plan written; (2) Managed Agents may be a first-party alternative to NemoClaw for Project Ajax — evaluate before Kathir procurement; (3) Background Monitor plugin (2.1.105) is the architectural basis for Monitor Agent v2 with real-time log watching + auto-RCA; (4) Batch API 300K + 50% pricing = overnight pre-computation of all 3 competitor analyses for 6AM briefing.
